title: Road Construction Status
desc: Sanctioned road work delayed or incomplete
summary: The road construction work sanctioned for our area has not been completed as per schedule.
questions: What is the total sanctioned budget for this road work?
What is the official project completion date?
What amount has been released and utilised so far?
Who is the contractor/agency responsible for execution?
What is the current physical status of the work?

title: Pension Application Status
summary: My pension application has been pending for an unreasonably long time without any update.
questions: On what date was my pension application received?
What is the current status of my application?
What are the reasons, if any, for the delay?
Which officer is responsible for clearing pending applications?
By what date is the pension expected to be sanctioned?
